ACCEPT.TITLE: Accept invitation
ACCEPT.SUCCESS_BODY: Your membership is now active. You can sign in to the portal.
ACCEPT.ERROR: Could not accept this invitation. It may be expired or invalid.
ACCEPT.NO_TOKEN: Invalid invitation link: no token provided.

AUTH.MUST_LOGIN_TO_VIEW: You must be logged in to view this page.

LOGIN.TITLE: Welcome back
LOGIN.SUBTITLE: Sign in to continue to Itqan

ERRORS.EMAIL_REQUIRED: Please enter a valid email address

REGISTER.TITLE: Create your account
REGISTER.SUBTITLE: Join Itqan to access our resources

ERRORS.EMAIL_REQUIRED: Please enter a valid email address
ERRORS.PASSWORD_REQUIRED: Password must be at least 6 characters

VERIFY_EMAIL.TITLE: Verify your email
VERIFY_EMAIL.SUBTITLE: Enter the verification code sent to your email.
VERIFY_EMAIL.RESEND_SENT: If your email is registered, a new code was sent.
VERIFY_EMAIL.RESEND_ERROR: Could not resend the code. Try again later.
VERIFY_EMAIL.ERROR: Verification failed. Check the code and try again.
VERIFY_EMAIL.UNVERIFIED_REDIRECT_INFO: Your email is not verified yet. Enter the code from your email below, or use “Resend code”. After verification you can set up two-factor authentication and other security options.

PASSKEY.TITLE: Sign in with passkey
PASSKEY.SUBTITLE: Use your device passkey or security key to continue.
PASSKEY.SIGNUP_SUBTITLE: Enter your email to start. If required, verify your email first, then register your passkey when prompted.
PASSKEY.SETUP_SUBTITLE: Add a passkey to your account so you can sign in faster next time.
PASSKEY.SIGNUP_SESSION_MISSING: Could not start passkey sign-up (no session from server). Close other tabs, refresh, and try again.
PASSKEY.WEBAUTHN_STATE_ERROR: This passkey step expired or was interrupted. Go back and try again from the start.
PASSKEY.SETUP_REAUTH_REQUIRED: For security, confirm your password before adding a passkey.
PASSKEY.ERROR: Passkey sign-in failed. Please try again.
PASSKEY.UNSUPPORTED: Passkeys are not available in this browser or environment. Use email and password or another sign-in method.
PASSKEY.RP_ID_ORIGIN_MISMATCH: Passkeys are configured for “{{rpId}}”, but you are on “{{host}}”. Open the app from the real site URL, or run the API with WebAuthn RP ID set to your dev host (see environment.webauthnReplaceRpIdWithHostname).
PASSKEY.RP_ID_BROWSER_REJECT: Your browser blocked this passkey because the site address does not match the passkey domain. Use the production or staging URL the team uses for the CMS.

LOGIN_BY_CODE.TITLE: Sign in with code
LOGIN_BY_CODE.SUBTITLE: We will email you a one-time sign-in code.
LOGIN_BY_CODE.CODE_PLACEHOLDER: Enter the code from your email
LOGIN_BY_CODE.RESEND_SENT: A new code was sent to your email.
LOGIN_BY_CODE.RATE_LIMIT: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
LOGIN_BY_CODE.SESSION_GONE: This sign-in session expired. Return to the sign-in page to start again.
LOGIN_BY_CODE.INCORRECT_CODE: That code is incorrect or expired. Please try again.
LOGIN_BY_CODE.REQUEST_TIMEOUT: The code request took too long. Please try again.
LOGIN_BY_CODE.REQUEST_ERROR: Could not send the code. Try again.

FORGOT_PASSWORD.TITLE: Reset your password
FORGOT_PASSWORD.SUBTITLE: Enter your email. If an account exists, we will send a link to reset your password.
FORGOT_PASSWORD.SUBTITLE_CODE: Enter your email. If an account exists, we will send a reset code to use on the next screen.
FORGOT_PASSWORD.SENT: If an account exists for this email, you will receive instructions shortly.
FORGOT_PASSWORD.ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.

RESET_PASSWORD.TITLE: Choose a new password
RESET_PASSWORD.CODE_PLACEHOLDER: Enter the code from your email
RESET_PASSWORD.CODE_SENT_HINT: If an account exists, we sent a reset code to {{email}}.
RESET_PASSWORD.ERROR: Could not reset password. The link or code may have expired.
RESET_PASSWORD.EXPIRED: The reset link has expired. Please request a new one.

CHANGE_PASSWORD.SUBTITLE: Update your password to keep your account secure.

MFA.TITLE: Two-factor authentication
MFA.SUBTITLE: Enter the code from your authenticator app or a recovery code.

SECURITY.TITLE: Account security
SECURITY.SUBTITLE: Manage two-factor authentication, recovery codes, and passkeys.
SECURITY.LOAD_ERROR: Could not load security settings. Try again later.
SECURITY.NO_AUTHENTICATORS: No MFA authenticators are registered yet.
SECURITY.TOTP_SETUP_HINT: Scan the otpauth URI in your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code to confirm.
SECURITY.TOTP_NOT_CONFIGURED_HINT: Authenticator app (TOTP) is not enrolled yet. You can activate it once your email is verified.
SECURITY.TOTP_DEACTIVATE_CONFIRM: Turn off TOTP? You can still use other MFA methods if configured.
SECURITY.TOTP_ACTIVATE_ERROR: Invalid code or could not activate TOTP.
SECURITY.RECOVERY_HINT: Save these codes in a safe place. Each code works once if you lose access to your authenticator.
SECURITY.RECOVERY_UNAVAILABLE: No recovery codes to show yet. They appear after you enable MFA (e.g. TOTP).
SECURITY.RECOVERY_ONE_TIME_VISIBILITY: The server may not show these codes again. Copy or download them now and store them safely.
SECURITY.RECOVERY_JUST_GENERATED: New codes were just created. Save them now — you may not be able to view them again after you leave this page.
SECURITY.RECOVERY_REDACTED: Unused recovery codes exist on your account, but the full list is hidden for security. Generate new codes if you need a printable copy (this invalidates current unused codes).
SECURITY.RECOVERY_ALL_USED: All recovery codes have been used. Generate a new set if you need backup codes for sign-in.
SECURITY.RECOVERY_REGEN_WARN: This invalidates all previous unused recovery codes. Continue only if you have saved the new set.
SECURITY.PASSKEY_HINT: Add a passkey to sign in without typing your password.
SECURITY.TOTP_SCAN_QR: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, or copy the URI below.
SECURITY.AUTHENTICATORS_PASSKEY_ONLY_HINT: Only passkeys are listed below; use Passkeys to manage them.
SECURITY.PASSKEY_DELETE_CONFIRM: Remove this passkey from your account?
SECURITY.PASSKEY_RENAME_ERROR: Could not update the passkey name.

EMAIL.TITLE: Email addresses
EMAIL.SUBTITLE: Manage addresses on your account, set a primary address, and request verification.

SESSIONS.TITLE: Sessions
SESSIONS.SUBTITLE: Devices where you are signed in. Revoke any session you do not recognize.

API_KEYS.TITLE: API keys
API_KEYS.SUBTITLE: Create keys to access CMS assets programmatically. Store secrets safely — raw values are shown only once.
API_KEYS.CREATE_HINT: Choose a recognizable name so you can revoke or rotate keys later.
API_KEYS.CREATE_MISSING_RAW_HINT: The API did not return a plaintext secret. Refresh the page; if this persists, check the backend response shape.
API_KEYS.REVEAL_HINT: Save this somewhere safe. You cannot view the full secret again after you leave this page.
API_KEYS.REVEAL_EMPTY: No plaintext was returned — if you lose it you may need to create a new key.
API_KEYS.RENAME_REQUIRED: Enter a name for this key.
API_KEYS.REVOKE_CONFIRM: Revoke this API key? Requests using this key will stop working.
API_KEYS.DELETE_CONFIRM: Permanently delete this API key? This cannot be undone.

PROVIDERS.TITLE: Connected accounts
PROVIDERS.SUBTITLE: Social logins linked to your account.
PROVIDERS.CONNECT_HINT: You will sign in with the provider and return here after consent.
PROVIDERS.CONNECT_TECH_HINT: If Connect fails or does nothing, the CMS and API usually need the same browser origin or a reverse proxy. See docs/AUTH_FLOW_MATRIX.md (Browser OAuth).
PROVIDERS.APP_MODE_HINT: Adding new providers from this app requires enabling OAuth redirect in your deployment configuration.
PROVIDERS.DISCONNECT_CONFIRM: Disconnect this provider from your account?
PROVIDERS.CONNECT_CROSS_ORIGIN_ERROR: Connect requires same-origin API and app in this environment. Use the staging CMS domain or configure a reverse proxy.

PROFILE.TITLE: Your account
PROFILE.SUBTITLE: Profile and security settings in one place.
PROFILE.NAME: Name
PROFILE.ACCOUNT_HINT: Manage login, MFA, devices, and linked providers.
PROFILE.CMS_HINT: Information shown across the CMS (bio, links).

REAUTH.TITLE: Confirm it is you
REAUTH.SUBTITLE: For your security, please confirm your password or use your passkey.
REAUTH.SUBTITLE_PASSWORD_ONLY: For your security, please confirm your password.
REAUTH.OR_MFA: Or use an authenticator / recovery code

OAUTH.INVALID_STATE: Invalid authentication state. Please try again.

PROVIDER_SIGNUP.TITLE: Complete your sign-up
PROVIDER_SIGNUP.DESC: We need a bit more information to finish creating your account after signing in with your provider.
PROVIDER_SIGNUP.ERROR: Could not complete sign-up. Please try again.
PROVIDER_SIGNUP.LOAD_ERROR: Could not load sign-up information. This step may not be available.

COMMON.REDIRECT_TO_LIBRARY_IN: Taking you to the library in {{seconds}} seconds…

VALIDATION.PHONE_INVALID: Please enter a valid phone number

ERRORS.NETWORK_ERROR: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
ERRORS.SERVER_ERROR: Server error. Please try again later.
ERRORS.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please correct the errors and try again.
ERRORS.UNAUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to perform this action.
ERRORS.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.

PROFILE.COMPLETE_PROFILE_DESCRIPTION: Help us understand more about you and your project

PROFILE.ORGANIZATION_PLACEHOLDER: e.g., University of Cairo, Google, Freelance

UI.PUBLISHER_INFO_UNAVAILABLE_DESC: The publisher profile couldn't be loaded. You can still browse the assets below.

LICENSES_DESCRIPTIONS.CC0: The creator has waived all copyright and related rights. You can copy, modify, distribute and use the work, even for commercial purposes, all without asking permission.
LICENSES_DESCRIPTIONS.CC-BY: You are free to share and adapt the material for any purpose, even commercially. You must give appropriate credit to the creator, provide a link to the license, and indicate if changes were made.
LICENSES_DESCRIPTIONS.CC-BY-SA: You are free to share and adapt the material for any purpose, even commercially. You must give appropriate credit, and if you remix or build upon the material, you must distribute your contributions under the same license.
LICENSES_DESCRIPTIONS.CC-BY-ND: You are free to share the material for any purpose, even commercially. You must give appropriate credit, and if you remix, transform, or build upon the material, you may not distribute the modified material.
LICENSES_DESCRIPTIONS.CC-BY-NC: You are free to share and adapt the material for non-commercial purposes only. You must give appropriate credit to the creator, provide a link to the license, and indicate if changes were made.
LICENSES_DESCRIPTIONS.CC-BY-NC-SA: You are free to share and adapt the material for non-commercial purposes only. You must give appropriate credit, and if you remix or build upon the material, you must distribute your contributions under the same license.
LICENSES_DESCRIPTIONS.CC-BY-NC-ND: You are free to share the material for non-commercial purposes only. You must give appropriate credit, and if you remix, transform, or build upon the material, you may not distribute the modified material.

PUBLISHERS.DESCRIPTION: Explore the network of certified publishers and providers on the Itqan platform.

ABOUT.PROJECT_DESCRIPTION: Itqan is a modern content management system designed to provide an exceptional experience in managing digital assets and educational resources.
ABOUT.VISION_DESCRIPTION: To be the leading platform for digital content management and educational resources in the region.
ABOUT.MISSION_DESCRIPTION: Empowering educational institutions to manage their digital content efficiently and effectively.
